Home Competitions Clubs Calendar Announcements About Us Contacts Submit

Submit an update

Propose an announcement, calendar event, competition, or club. A PTA admin will review it before it goes live — like a pull request for the website.

Setup required

Copy src/assets/supabase-config.example.js to src/assets/supabase-config.js, add your Supabase URL and anon key, then run npm run build.

Also run supabase/schema.sql in your Supabase SQL editor.

Sign in to contribute

Enter your email and password to submit updates.

Reset password

Enter your email and we will send you a link to choose a new password.

Signed in as

Admin inbox

Preview on the site

Track what you have submitted and any notes from PTA admins.

Serving Frazer Middle School and Frazer High School. Maintained by parent volunteers.
